metadata.name: HDFC Gold ETF Fund of Fund Direct Plan Growth

sections.overview: Overview: About HDFC Gold ETF Fund of Fund Direct Plan GrowthHDFC Gold ETF Fund of Fund Direct Plan Growth is a Commodities Mutual Fund Scheme launched by HDFC Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 10 Dec 1999. Arun Agarwal is the Current Fund Manager of HDFC Gold ETF Fund of Fund Direct Plan Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹12,121.18Cr and the Latest NAV as of 06 Jul 2026 is ₹45.12. The HDFC Gold ETF Fund of Fund Direct Plan Growth is rated High risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹100. Minimum Lumpsum Investment is ₹100. Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 15 days. ;Investment Objective

sections.tax: Tax implications: Tax implicationIf you redeem within two years, returns are taxed as per your Income Tax slab. If you redeem after two years, returns are taxed at 12.5%.Check past data
